top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Stock markets sense a shift
top_signals.summary: Global stocks are under pressure despite oil easing after a ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon, while investors anticipate SpaceX's IPO.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Isabel Schnabel: From money market funds to stablecoins: lessons for central banks
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: European stocks head for lower open as Iran-U.S. tensions escalate
top_signals.summary: Tensions between Iran and the U.S. on Wednesday sent Asian stocks lower overnight, and European equity markets look set to follow suit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Osaka Bourse to Add More Single-Stock Options for Market Makers
top_signals.summary: Osaka Exchange Inc. will increase the number of single-stock options in its market-making program in another effort to boost derivative use in Japan, bourse officials said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
